exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response is an array', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Response time is less than 3000ms', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(3000); });

pm.test('Each book has id, title, pageCount fields', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); jsonData.forEach(function(book) { pm.expect(book).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(book).to.have.property('title'); pm.expect(book).to.have.property('pageCount'); }); });
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response id equals 1', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.id).to.eql(1); });
pm.test('Response has title field', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData).to.have.property('title'); });
pm.test('Response has pageCount field', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData).to.have.property('pageCount'); });
pm.test('Status code is 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });

pm.test('Response has title field with Not Found or similar', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData).to.have.property('title'); pm.expect(jsonData.title).to.match(/not found/i); });
pm.test('Status code is 400', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
pm.test('Response body is not empty', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.not.be.empty; });
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response id equals 201', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.id).to.eql(201); });
pm.test('Response title equals Test Book', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.title).to.eql('Test Book'); });
pm.test('Response pageCount equals 300', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.pageCount).to.eql(300); });

body.raw:
{
  "id": 201,
  "title": "Test Book",
  "description": "A test book description",
  "pageCount": 300,
  "excerpt": "This is an excerpt",
  "publishDate": "2024-01-01T00:00:00"
}
